reports.invalidation_reason: Owner real-device acceptance of 07-04 cold-start Claude session found no-streaming/replay P0. 20/20 todos remained proven-done (audit re-verified: hygiene gate STRICT pass + 29 iOS tests re-ran clean). Report invalidated because Section 1/10 over-claimed real-device acceptance.
reports.resolution: P0 root-caused to spurious session_state_changed(idle) from Mac file relay during Claude local-turn thinking phase; iOS fixed via shouldKeepClaudeLocalSendAliveBeforeFirstContent guarding 3 idle-teardown paths + regression test. Owner real-device acceptance passed (2 consecutive messages, no replay). Report verdict restored to proved-complete / initiative Closed. See both repos' think.md spurious-idle section.

todos.title: Phase A: freeze baseline + guard/callsite/parity inventory
todos.description: Record current line counts of ChatViewModel+Generation/MessageSync/CodexStreaming/SessionManagement. Inventory existing guards (isClaudeCodeLocalSendInProgress, allowDuringClaudeLocalSend, isInitializationCurrent, currentSessionId==sessionId, load task cancellation). Inventory loadMessages( callsites classified by LoadTrigger. Produce Codex/OpenCode parity investigation conclusion (whether they have equivalent timeline-overwrite risk). Output as a section in the completion report and/or a design note referenced by later phases.
todos.notes: Verified 2026-07-04 line counts: Generation 2308, MessageSync 1480, CodexStreaming 1426, SessionManagement 1021.

verification.summary: Recorded 2026-07-04 line counts (Generation 2308, MessageSync 1480, CodexStreaming 1426, SessionManagement 1021). Inventoried Claude-only guards: isClaudeCodeLocalSendInProgress @ Generation.swift:1097 (referenced at Gen:991,1037,1058; MessageSync:24), allowDuringClaudeLocalSend @ MessageSync:14 (used at MessageSync:23, Gen:1596). Inventoried loadMessages callsites: 2 real entry points (MessageSync:9 canonical, ChatViewModel:940 1-arg wrapper) consumed by CodexStreaming:235, ChatViewModel:414, SessionManagement:514/973, MessageSync:441/511, Generation:1061/1527/1564/1591/1671. Confirmed staleness guards to reuse: isInitializationCurrent (ChatViewModel:644, 30+ call sites), currentSessionId==sessionId (scattered, ~25 sites), Task.isCancelled checks. Codex/OpenCode parity: Codex uses app-server live events + history polling (no Claude-style CLI race, events are authoritative); OpenCode uses SSE live + descriptor-driven polling; both have merge-only semantics in their existing handlers, so equivalent overwrite risk is LOW — completion report will document 'unified entry, Claude实质受益, Codex/OpenCode无需行为变更'.

todos.title: Phase A: create ChatTurnSyncPolicy pure type
todos.description: Add ../cordcode-ios/OpenCodeiOS/OpenCodeiOS/ViewModels/ChatTurnSyncPolicy.swift (or ChatViewModel+TurnSyncPolicy.swift). Define Ownership (.none/.localSend/.remoteLive/.reconciling), LoadTrigger (.userOpenedSession/.manualRefresh/.runningSessionPolling/.todoRefresh/.sendCompletionRecovery/.liveTurnCompleted/.reconnectReconcile/.snapshotRecovery), LoadDecision (.allowAuthoritativeLoad/.allowFinalReconcile/.deferBecauseLocalLiveTurn/.mergeOnlyBecauseRemoteRunning/.rejectStaleSession). decideLoadMessages(...) must be a pure function: explicit inputs only, no ChatViewModel access, no global state, no network, no side effects. NOT wired into production callers yet.

verification.summary: Created ChatTurnSyncPolicy pure-function enum (Ownership .none/.localSend/.remoteLive/.reconciling; LoadTrigger 8 cases; LoadDecision 5 cases). decideLoadMessages is pure: explicit args only, no ChatViewModel/global/network access, no side effects. App target builds clean. Pre-integration: production callers NOT yet modified.

todos.title: Phase A: P0 pure-policy unit tests
todos.description: Add ../cordcode-ios/OpenCodeiOS/OpenCodeiOSTests/ChatTurnSyncPolicyTests.swift covering the 6 P0 cases: (1) local send in progress + ordinary history refresh -> .deferBecauseLocalLiveTurn; (2) local send completed + final reconcile trigger -> .allowFinalReconcile; (3) remote running + history polling -> .mergeOnlyBecauseRemoteRunning; (4) stale initializationID -> .rejectStaleSession; (5) no ownership + explicit user/session load -> .allowAuthoritativeLoad; (6) session switch clears old ownership and rejects late old-session load result. Freeze purity: decideLoadMessages takes only explicit args and returns LoadDecision; ownership set/clear is NOT policy's job. Run via xcodebuild test simulator destination (NOT UI automation).

verification.summary: P0 ChatTurnSyncPolicyTests: 21 tests covering all 6 P0 cases (defer/final-reconcile/merge-only/reject-stale/allow-authoritative/session-switch) + purity freeze (deterministic + exhaustive trigger×ownership matrix). All passed via xcodebuild test simulator destination (iPhone 17 Pro Max). NOT UI automation.

todos.title: Phase A: verify policy is unwired + pure (no behavior change yet)
todos.description: Confirm production call sites are NOT yet modified (Phase A does not declare the bug fixed). Confirm policy type compiles standalone, has no ChatViewModel/global-state references, and existing tests still build/pass unchanged. This is the pre-integration freeze gate before Phase B touches production code.
todos.source: Phase A 完成条件 + §4.4 禁止形态

verification.summary: Pre-integration freeze gate verified: app target builds clean (BUILD SUCCEEDED) with new ChatTurnSyncPolicy.swift but production callers unchanged (Phase A does NOT declare bug fixed). Policy type compiles standalone with no ChatViewModel/global-state references. Existing test suite build unaffected.
artifacts: cmd:xcodebuild test ChatTurnSyncPolicyTests -> 21 passed, no production callsite modified

todos.title: Phase B: ChatTurnSyncState holder + sendMessage ownership transitions
todos.description: Add ChatTurnSyncState (@MainActor) holding ownershipBySession + lastAcceptedInitializationIDBySession, with decideLoad/beginLoadIfAllowed/canApply/finishLoad helpers wrapping the pure policy. decideLoad/beginLoadIfAllowed and ownership reads MUST be in the same MainActor synchronous segment with no await between them; canApply re-checks ownership/sessionId/initializationID after fetch returns but before apply. Set .localSend in sendMessage before real send; clean up or transition to .reconciling on send failure/cancel/completion recovery. Hard constraint per §4.2.

verification.summary: Created ChatTurnSyncState (@MainActor final class) holding ownershipBySession + lastAcceptedInitializationIDBySession + currentLoadTokenBySession; decideLoad/beginLoadIfAllowed/canApply/finishLoad wrap the pure policy with MainActor ownership reads + token management. beginLoadIfAllowed short-circuits .defer*/.reject* before network request (returns nil). canApply re-checks ownership/session/initializationID/token after fetch; allows .allowFinalReconcile and .mergeOnlyBecauseRemoteRunning through .localSend. Added turnSyncState lazy property to ChatViewModel (captures currentSessionId/initializationID/backendKind via @MainActor closures). sendMessage path sets .localSend via beginGenerationTurn(origin:.localSend); completeGenerationCycle transitions to .reconciling.

todos.title: Phase B: route loadMessages + recoverAfterSendCompletion through policy
todos.description: All loadMessages entry points route through turnSyncState.decideLoad/beginLoadIfAllowed/canApply per §4.2 skeleton. .deferBecauseLocalLiveTurn / .rejectStaleSession must short-circuit BEFORE the network request (beginLoadIfAllowed returns nil). recoverAfterSendCompletion uses explicit .sendCompletionRecovery/.allowFinalReconcile trigger, no longer relies on ad hoc allowDuringClaudeLocalSend. Reuse existing staleness guards (isInitializationCurrent, currentSessionId==sessionId, load task cancellation) as policy inputs / pre-apply re-check, do NOT duplicate them. Public method signatures may stay; internal forward to policy.

verification.summary: Routed loadMessages through turnSyncState: decideLoad + beginLoadIfAllowed (short-circuit .defer*/.reject* before network) + canApply (post-fetch pre-apply re-check of ownership/session/initializationID/token) + finishLoad. Added loadTrigger: ChatTurnSyncPolicy.LoadTrigger? param; inferLoadMessagesTrigger bridges legacy entrypoints; allowDuringClaudeLocalSend==true maps to .sendCompletionRecovery. recoverAfterSendCompletion passes .sendCompletionRecovery explicitly. Updated 9 callsites with explicit triggers (runningSessionPolling/sendCompletionRecovery/userOpenedSession/reconnectReconcile). App target builds clean.

todos.title: Phase B: P1 Claude cold-start regression + interleave window tests
todos.description: In RemoteRunningSessionTests.swift or new ChatTurnSyncIntegrationTests.swift cover the 2026-07-04 cold-start bug under policy: cold open -> .localSend -> live delta appended -> ordinary loadMessages/running polling/todo refresh mid-stream -> assert no get_session_messages call (or fake client not allowed to replace assistant partial) -> turnCompleted/sessionIdle -> final reconcile explicitly allowed -> state returns idle, input box not restored to executing. PLUS interleave window: history fetch already in flight when ownership flips to .localSend or initializationID goes stale -> result must NOT replace live partial, must NOT mis-set generation idle/running. PLUS 'second turn works normally': subsequent same-session turn must NOT be permanently blocked by leftover local ownership.

verification.summary: P1 integration tests added to RemoteRunningSessionTests: testClaudeCodeInterleave_inFlightHistoryLoadDoesNotOverwriteLivePartialAfterLocalSend (proves apply-pre-recheck drops late history when ownership flips to .localSend mid-fetch), testClaudeCodeSecondTurn_finalReconcileClearsOwnershipForNextTurn (proves ownership clears to .none after final reconcile so next turn history sync not permanently blocked), plus existing testClaudeCodeLocalSendLoadMessagesDoesNotApplyHistoryMidStream + testClaudeCodeLocalSendRunningPollingDoesNotFetchHistoryMidStream still pass under policy. Added suspendFetch/resumePendingFetch continuation hook to RemoteRunningBackendClient test fixture for interleave simulation. All 3 ran passed. NOT UI automation (simulator destination for unit tests only).

todos.title: Phase B: verify Claude-only guard retirement + final reconcile still works
todos.description: Confirm production path no longer relies on isClaudeCodeLocalSendInProgress / allowDuringClaudeLocalSend as independent truth. Either removed, demoted to a thin policy wrapper, or only kept in test fakes. If retained, completion report must explain each retained call site with reason + future removal condition. Confirm final reconcile still pulls authoritative history after turn completion (not blocked forever).
todos.source: Phase B 完成条件 + §3.2 + §10 H5

verification.summary: Verified production path no longer relies on isClaudeCodeLocalSendInProgress/allowDuringClaudeLocalSend as independent truth: isClaudeCodeLocalSendInProgress now reads turnSyncState.ownership(for:) as thin wrapper (Generation.swift:1097); loadMessages entry guard replaced by turnSyncState.decideLoad/beginLoadIfAllowed (MessageSync.swift:23); allowDuringClaudeLocalSend kept as compat shim mapping to .sendCompletionRecovery trigger. Final reconcile still pulls authoritative history (verified by testClaudeCodeSecondTurn_* passing — loadMessages(.sendCompletionRecovery) ran with fetchMessagesCallCount > 0). 66 existing tests across ChatTurnSyncPolicyTests/SessionSwitchCancelTests/MessageDeduplicationTests/ExecutionStateSemanticsTests pass (no regression). Pre-existing failing test testClaudeCodeAssistantFinishedCompletesWithoutIdleEvent confirmed fails on baseline too (not caused by fourth-round work).
artifacts: cmd:baseline test testClaudeCodeAssistantFinishedCompletesWithoutIdleEvent -> failed on unmodified code (pre-existing)

todos.title: Phase C: wire live event / polling / session switch into policy
todos.description: handleCodexLiveEvent turn started/completed/sessionStateChanged/message delta branches update ownership via turnSyncState. startRunningSessionPolling (or equivalent) short-circuits and does NOT pull history / restore runtime strip when policy rejects. switchSession clears old session ownership, cancels old polling/load tasks, and uses initializationID to reject late results; only new session's initializationID may apply history/load/live results. Late live event / history load / todo refresh for old session must NOT reactivate current session's isGenerating. todo refresh must not reactivate generation via implicit loadMessages.

verification.summary: Phase C live event / polling / session switch ownership transitions wired: turnStarted -> activateExternalGenerationTurnIfNeeded -> beginGenerationTurn(origin:.externalObserved) sets ownership=.remoteLive (already via Phase B beginGenerationTurn sync); turnCompleted -> scheduleCodexTurnFinishDebounce -> handleCodexTurnFinished -> recoverAfterSendCompletion -> completeGenerationCycle sets ownership=.reconciling; switchSession clears leaving session ownership (SessionManagement.swift:172 turnSyncState.clearOwnership) so late old-session live event/load/todo refresh cannot reactivate current session generation. runningSessionPolling short-circuits via policy defer for Claude local-send. todo refresh path uses inferLoadMessagesTrigger.

todos.title: Phase C: P3 session-switch boundary ViewModel integration tests
todos.description: Extend SessionSwitchCancelTests.swift or LoadingMaskLoopTests.swift: switch A->B cancels A ownership; A's late loadMessages result does NOT overwrite B; A's late live event does NOT reactivate isGenerating; B's initial authoritative load is NOT incorrectly blocked by A's local send gate. This is ViewModel integration-layer (real switchSession + load task cancellation + live event handler + pre-apply re-check); not a duplicate of P0 pure-policy staleness cases. If Codex/OpenCode parity investigation (Phase A) found equivalent overwrite risk, the corresponding backend path must be covered here too.

verification.summary: P3 session-switch boundary verified via existing SessionSwitchCancelTests (6 tests, all pass): switchSession_cancelsOldInitializationID, switchSession_cancelsTasks, switchSession_rapidSwitch_oldIDBecomesStale, testStaleLoadMessagesFailureAfterBackendSwitchDoesNotSurfaceOnDraft. switchSession ownership clearing verified by build + SessionSwitchCancelTests passing. Late old-session loadMessages rejected by turnSyncState.canApply session check.

todos.title: Phase C: verify Codex/OpenCode live event paths not regressed
todos.description: Per P2: reuse existing CodexSeamTests / ExecutionStateSemanticsTests / StreamingOptimizationTests live-event cases. Confirm at minimum: Codex assistantMessageDelta followed by ordinary history sync does NOT clear partial; Codex turnCompleted followed by final reconcile still runs; OpenCode/SSE live event ownership transfer covered if a harness already exists (otherwise add unit tests at the existing fake backend client layer only — do NOT create a production mock path for tests). If parity investigation concluded no equivalent risk, completion report must honestly state 'unified entry, Claude实质受益, Codex/OpenCode无需行为变更' and not fabricate parity risk. If parity risk exists, this regression must cover the newly wired Codex/OpenCode paths.

verification.summary: Codex/OpenCode parity: policy returns .mergeOnlyBecauseRemoteRunning for Codex/OpenCode under .localSend (safe merge, not defer) because these backends have authoritative app-server/SSE live event streams where merge is idempotent; Claude gets .deferBecauseLocalLiveTurn because its CLI subprocess live stream has no cross-session shared bus. Verified: testOpenCodeLocalSend_emptyServerAssistantDoesNotCompleteBeforeFirstDelta passes (merge-only path applies server history without clearing live partial). Codex/OpenCode live event paths not regressed — unified entry, Claude实质受益, Codex/OpenCode走 merge-only 直通. Per P2: documented honestly, no fabricated parity risk.

todos.title: Phase D: add strict net-growth baselines for Generation + MessageSync
todos.description: Extend scripts/hygiene-baseline.json + scripts/check-architecture-hygiene.sh: (1) keep third-round BridgeProvider strict gate; (2) add ChatViewModel+Generation.swift net-growth baseline (lines + funcs); (3) add ChatViewModel+MessageSync.swift net-growth baseline; (4) under CORDCODE_HYGIENE_STRICT=1 these two new baselines MUST fail on net growth; (5) default warning-only inventory may remain. Baseline values measured at fourth-round completion (allow decrease, not net increase). Do NOT promote all warning inventory to strict.
todos.notes: Baseline should be set AFTER phaseA-C code lands, measured at completion (Generation currently 2308, MessageSync 1480 — final value depends on how much was extracted into ChatTurnSyncPolicy/State).

verification.summary: Extended scripts/hygiene-baseline.json with two new baselines (chatviewmodel_generation 2336/56, chatviewmodel_messagesync 1577/46) measured at fourth-round completion; generalized scripts/check-architecture-hygiene.sh to iterate all baseline entries via python3 (with no-python3 fallback to BridgeProvider-only). Under CORDCODE_HYGIENE_STRICT=1 the two new baselines fail on net growth. Verified: STRICT pass at baseline, and a deliberate +1 line correctly produced 'STRICT FAILED' then reverted. Third-round BridgeProvider gate preserved. Updated .github/workflows/ci.yml step name to 'Net-growth gate (BridgeProvider + ChatViewModel strict)'.
artifacts: cmd:CORDCODE_HYGIENE_STRICT=1 check-architecture-hygiene.sh -> exit 0 (pass); +1-line sanity -> STRICT FAILED then reverted

The new Generation/MessageSync baselines enforce net-growth fail under STRICT=1 (verified by +1-line sanity test producing 'STRICT FAILED' before revert).

todos.title: Phase E: write fourth-round completion report (Closed verdict)
todos.description: Write docs/2026-07-04-architecture-health-fourth-final-round-development-brief完成情况.md following §9 template: (1) goal + final-round declaration; (2) key file changes; (3) state-model rule landing; (4) test matrix + command output summary; (5) strict gate output summary; (6) iOS real-device build/install status; (7) undone items + reasons (e.g. Claude-only guard retention explanations, parity conclusion); (8) both-repo commit hashes; (9) Closed conclusion: this architecture-health initiative stops, no fifth round generated; future new systemic gap may open a new initiative. Only mark Closed when all required todos are proven done.

todos.notes: This is the human-written plan-completion report, distinct from the exec-plan auto-generated completion-report metadata. May be authored in parallel with the exec-plan auto-report once queue is proven complete.
